title: Tcard_LH8n-H333MNOP-U-GL-240703V659
description:
Caution! This update may crash rooted devices.
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.
Update Version: LH8n-H333MNOP-U-GL-240703V659
Optimized Issues:
1. Upgraded the Android version from Android 13 to Android 14.
2. Upgraded the HiOS version from HiOS 13.0 to HiOS 14.0.
3. Upgraded/added some special features that users are concerned about and optimized them for more apps to improve the overall experience. These features include but are not limited to AI Smart Charge and Ella Voice Assistant.
Reminding:
1. Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2. Visit the TECNO SPOT forum (TECNO SPOT) for more information.
